_comment: Ratchet baseline for scripts/auditRatchet.mjs. Per-manifest count of high+critical PRODUCTION-dependency advisories (npm audit --omit=dev). The PR audit gate fails only when a manifest EXCEEDS its baseline, so it catches newly introduced vulnerabilities without sitting red on the pre-existing debt Dependabot is already chipping away at. When a Dependabot PR lowers a count, run `node scripts/auditRatchet.mjs --update` and commit the new (lower) baseline.
